        private void addInstances(ImmutableSet<Term> terms,
                          Services services)
        Parameters:
        terms - on which trigger are doning matching search every Substitution s by matching triggers from triggersSet to terms compute their cost and store the pair of instance (Term) and cost(Long) in instancesCostCache
